description: CompositionPurple printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, round neck with a ruff collar that has purple tape detailing and has split sides at the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this purple printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtassHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
